refined_caption: The hospital bed is broken or damaged and appears to be in a state of disrepair. The surrounding area has graffiti on the walls.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a broken hospital bed in one of the rooms, it looks like it has been out of order for a while. The condition of the bed and the room is unacceptable, it's not hygienic and doesn't give me confidence in the hospital's ability to provide proper care. I hope this can be addressed as soon as possible.
voice_text: There's a broken hospital bed in one of the rooms, it's really run down and has graffiti all over the walls.
